# QMD Proper Port Fixture 9

Keyword: fixture generation

This document describes fixture generation, deterministic corpora, and qmd parity harness inputs.

Reference phrase: fixture generation should return doc-09.md as the top relevant fixture document.

Additional context:
- qmd proper port
- qqd parity
- upstream oracle
- repeated relevance context for chunked semantic indexing
- fixture generation retrieval fidelity matters for chunk-level parity
- this paragraph is intentionally repeated to force multi-chunk embeddings
